src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/Swag.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger 2 configuration with native SpringDoc OpenAPI 3 specification to ensure compatibility with Java 17 and modern Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/Swag.human_impl: Removed @EnableSwagger2 and Docket beans; added OpenAPI bean using io.swagger.v3.oas.models classes.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/WebC.general_idea: Remove the @Order annotation from the CORS configuration bean, likely because it is no longer needed or conflicts with newer Spring Boot default behaviors in Java 17.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/config/WebC.human_impl: Removed @Order(1) annotation and its import from WebConfig.java

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 17.
Add a new 'application' field to the UserEntity model to store application context.
Provide getter and setter methods for the new 'application' field.
Reformat the constructor parameter list for better readability.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.human_impl: Set<UserRole> roles, LocalDateTime createdAt, LocalDateTime lastPasswordChangeAt)

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Remove inheritance from deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / Java 17 ecosystem standards.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.human_impl: Changed class declaration from 'extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter' to standalone class.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Replace deprecated method chaining API with lambda-based DSL for HttpSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.human_impl: Replaced '.csrf().disable()' and '.authorizeRequests()' with '.csrf(csrf -> ...)' and '.authorizeHttpRequests(authorize -> ...)' inside a SecurityFilterChain bean.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Update AuthenticationManager bean definition to use AuthenticationConfiguration instead of overriding protected methods.
Update request matcher syntax from antMatchers to requestMatchers to align with new Spring Security API.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.human_impl: Replaced '.antMatchers(...)' with '.requestMatchers(...)' inside the authorizeHttpRequests lambda.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Introduce a dedicated SecurityFilterChain for H2 console to handle frame options and permit access explicitly.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.human_impl: Added new @Bean method 'h2ConsoleSecurityFilterChain' with securityMatcher for '/h2-console/**'.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Add explicit security rules for Swagger UI endpoints requiring ADMIN role.
Add explicit security rules for user management endpoints.
Adjust the order of security filter chains to ensure correct precedence between default and H2 console chains.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.human_impl: Changed @Order(1) on class to @Order(2) on default chain and added @Order(1) on H2 chain.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server adapter with the new Spring Authorization Server configuration using SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Removed AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter and @EnableAuthorizationServer; added SecurityFilterChain bean with OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfiguration.applyDefaultSecurity.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace legacy ClientDetailsServiceConfigurer with RegisteredClientRepository using the new OAuth2.1 model.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Replaced in-memory client configuration with RegisteredClient builder and InMemoryRegisteredClientRepository.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace static JWT signing key string with dynamic RSA key pair generation and JWK source.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Replaced JwtAccessTokenConverter with JWKSource<SecurityContext> bean generating RSA keys via KeyPairGenerator.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace legacy TokenStore and JwtAccessTokenConverter with standard JwtDecoder bean.
Add explicit AuthorizationServerSettings bean to define server endpoints.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Added @Bean AuthorizationServerSettings authorizationServerSettings() returning default builder.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Remove imports and fields related to the deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 library.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Removed imports for org.springframework.security.oauth2.config.* and fields like passwordEncoder, authenticationManager.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Refactor Spring Security configuration from deprecated class-based inheritance to modern lambda DSL required for Spring Security 5.7+/6.x compatibility.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Removed extends ResourceServerConfigurerAdapter and @EnableResourceServer; replaced .authorizeRequests() with .authorizeHttpRequests() and chained lambda configurations.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Update Swagger API documentation endpoint path to match OpenAPI 3.0 specification used by newer SpringDoc/Swagger versions.
Explicitly configure OAuth2 Resource Server with JWT support to replace implicit configuration from removed ResourceServerConfigurerAdapter.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.human_impl: Added .oauth2ResourceServer(oauth2 -> oauth2.jwt(jwt -> { })) to the HttpSecurity chain.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.18 to 3.2.5 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17.
Define a property for the Springdoc OpenAPI version to manage dependency versioning.
Replace the deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 autoconfigure with the native Spring Boot 3 OAuth2 Resource Server starter.
Add the Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server dependency required for Boot 3.x authorization flows.
Replace Springfox Swagger dependencies with Springdoc OpenAPI, which is compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Update ModelMapper to version 3.2.0 to ensure compatibility with newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove explicit Jackson databind dependency, relying on the version managed by the Spring Boot parent POM.
Add Spring Security Test dependency to support testing security configurations in the new stack.
Remove the standalone Swagger UI webjar as it is replaced by Springdoc's integrated UI.
Update Flyway core to version 10.7.1 to ensure compatibility with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
Remove the H2 in-memory database dependency, likely switching to a different database or removing dev-only in-memory support.
Configure the Spring Boot Maven plugin to exclude Lombok from the repackaged jar, avoiding runtime conflicts.
Remove the explicit configuration to skip tests, implying tests are now expected to run or are managed differently.

COMMANDS.md.general_idea: Update kubectl cp commands to reflect the new database file path inside the container.
Remove manual base64 encoding instructions and point to the existing secrets.yaml file.
Rename the JWT secret key from jwt-key to jwt-signing-key in documentation.
Add new OAuth2 related secret keys to the documentation.
Add documentation link for Swagger UI.
Update example OAuth2 credentials to match the new development configuration.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace CMD with ENTRYPOINT to ensure the Java process runs as PID 1 and correctly handles signal forwarding in the container.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Removes the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Compose specification standards.
Changes the service definition to build the image locally from the current directory instead of pulling a pre-built 'latest' tag.
Updates the image name to a specific developer tag for the new environment setup.
Updates the host volume mount path to a specific absolute path on the development machine.
Adds a custom command to execute a specific startup script for the development environment.

k8s/deployment.yaml.general_idea: Inject the JWT audience configuration into the container environment from a Kubernetes secret.
k8s/deployment.yaml.human_impl:
- name: JWT_AUDIENCE
  valueFrom:
    secretKeyRef:
      name: oauth2-secrets
      key: oauth-audience

scripts/run-dev.sh.general_idea: Pass Spring profile and server address configuration via JVM system properties instead of environment variables.
